author: Geoff Curtis
title: AI is about to send millions to ‘professional identity purgatory.’ Here’s what I discovered after my 30 year career crashed to a halt
description: For high achievers, professional identity isn't just what you do—it's who you are. AI disruption is about to test that in ways most of us aren't prepared for.
